title: angelica angelicastrum
intro: Angelica angelicastrum, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carrot family, native to Asia and used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to stimulate blood circulation and regulate menstrual cycles. The health benefits of Angelica angelicastrum include alleviating symptoms of menopause, improving fertility, and reducing the risk of certain diseases, such as high blood pressure and cardiovascular disease. Angelica angelicastrum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
